examples: The Virgin Queen favored a kind of marzipan called marchpane.
Little marzipan carrots are the traditional decoration.
A third of upper-middle managers are now women - "the marzipan layer" -she notes.
The ornate snowflake decoration on top turned out to be more akin to marzipan than to conventional icing.
Because I don't do marzipan, I don't have marzipan in my house, and my kids don't eat marzipan.
